incorrects.description: Branch 2: Student selected only 'All have 4 groups of 2' but missed 'All have 8 things'

params.description: The answer 8 highlights in the equation

steps.text: You found the structure: 4 groups of 2. That structure gives us a total. Look at the equation. What number comes after the equals sign?

incorrects.description: Branch 3: Student selected neither correct answer

params.description: The 4 rows in the books image highlight to show grouping structure

steps.text: Look past what the pictures show. Count the groups in each picture, then count how many are in each group. What pattern do you see in all three?

incorrects.description: Branch 4: Student selected at least one incorrect answer along with possibly some correct answers

steps.text: The pictures look different. Books, cups, butterflies. Different things. But the equation fits all three because something about how they're arranged is the same. What is it?

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

params.description: System counts the 4 rows in books image, then counts 2 items per row
System counts the 4 stacks in cups image, then counts 2 items per stack
System counts the 4 circled groups in butterflies image, then counts 2 items per group

steps.text: Let me show you. Books: I count 4 rows, 2 books in each row. Cups: 4 stacks, 2 cups in each stack. Butterflies: 4 circles, 2 butterflies in each circle. Every picture has the same structure: 4 groups of 2. That gives us 8 things total. The correct answers are 'All have 4 groups of 2' and 'All have 8 things.'
